text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Here we are at the Mile Championship! 1,600
meters on turf! And I know who my toughest
opponent will be!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She's always energetic and the life of the party! A
sprinter with explosive breakaway speed...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, my heart is racing! Let's have a good
race today!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Chills, girl! You're so chill, imma call you
Chill-hauser!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No cap though, I'm low-key shook. But sittin'
around shakin' in my cleats won't get me that dub!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So catch me hitting that rainbow front running
breakaway win so I can go home and wahey with
my besties!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Y'know, like, let's have a good race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh! Then, wahey to you too!
